landing.title: Invention Readiness Self-Assessment
landing.subtitle: National Center of Technology Commercialization
landing.tagline: Understand where your invention stands — across Technology, Manufacturing, and Commercialisation Readiness.
landing.aboutText: This tool guides you step-by-step through three internationally recognised readiness frameworks: TRL (Technology), MRL (Manufacturing), and CRL (Commercialisation). By the end, you will know your current readiness level in each dimension — helping you and NCTC understand how to best support your invention.
landing.trlAbout: TRL measures how mature your technology is — from a basic idea (TRL 1) to a proven deployed system (TRL 9).
landing.mrlAbout: MRL measures how ready you are for manufacturing — from initial exploration (MRL 1) to full-rate production (MRL 10).
landing.crlAbout: CRL measures your commercial readiness — from identifying a problem (CRL 1) to a full go-to-market launch plan (CRL 9).
landing.disclaimer: This is a self-assessment tool. Results are not an official evaluation or certification.

form.title: About You & Your Invention
form.subtitle: Tell us about yourself and your invention so we can personalise your report.
form.inventionTitlePlaceholder: The name of your invention or research

errors.phone: A valid phone number is required.
errors.description: Description must be 300 characters or fewer.

assessment.noSelection: Please select your level before proceeding.

review.title: Review Your Assessment
review.subtitle: Please review your information and assessment results before submitting.
review.name: Name
review.declarationText: I declare that all information provided in this self-assessment is accurate and truthful to the best of my knowledge. I understand that this is a self-assessment and not an official evaluation. I consent to sharing this information with the National Center of Technology Commercialisation (NCTC) for the purpose of supporting and developing innovations in Egypt.
review.declarationLabel: I agree to the above declaration
review.errorMsg: Submission failed. Please check your connection and try again.

confirmation.title: Assessment Submitted
confirmation.message: Your assessment has been successfully submitted. Our team at NCTC may be in touch if we'd like to learn more about your invention.
confirmation.nextStepsSubtitle: To advance to the next level in each area, here is what you need to work towards:
confirmation.actionPrefix: To move to the next level, you need to:
confirmation.maxMsg: You have reached the highest {{label}} level. Congratulations!
